Quick Answers

How quickly can you start?

We can begin your audit within 24 hours of receiving your request. Implementation typically starts within one week.

Do you work with practices outside the US?

Currently we focus on US and Canadian medical practices. Contact us for other regions.

What's your success rate?

94% of our clients see measurable AI visibility improvements within 90 days.
